name: Web - Remote Code Execution (RCE) Attempt
description: Detects Remote Code Execution attempts via web requests. Covers command injection in parameters, shell metacharacters, PHP/Python/Perl code injection patterns, and common RCE payloads targeting web applications.
search: index=web (sourcetype=nginx_access OR sourcetype=apache_access) | eval full_req=lower(uri)."|".(if(isnotnull(uri_query), lower(uri_query), "")) | eval rce_match=case( match(full_req, "(;|%3b|%7c|\|).{0,30}(cat|ls|id|whoami|pwd|wget|curl|bash|sh|nc|python|perl|ruby|php)"), "Command injection", match(full_req, "(%60|`).*(%60|`)"), "Backtick execution", match(full_req, "\$\(.*\)"), "Shell subshell injection", match(full_req, "system\s*\(|exec\s*\(|passthru\s*\(|shell_exec\s*\(|popen\s*\("), "PHP code injection", match(full_req, "(wget|curl).{0,50}(http://|https://|ftp://)"), "Download dropper", match(full_req, "/bin/(bash|sh|dash)|/usr/bin/(python|perl|ruby)"), "Shell path in request", match(full_req, "eval\s*\(|assert\s*\("), "Eval injection", 1==0, null()) | where isnotnull(rce_match) | stats count as attempt_count, values(rce_match) as attack_types, values(uri) as payloads, values(status) as status_codes by src_ip, host | eval severity="critical" | eval mitre="T1059" | sort -attempt_count | table src_ip, host, attempt_count, attack_types, payloads, status_codes, severity, mitre
author: SOC Team
